PRESS · TAMAZIA

Press kit

Last updated 5 May 2026.

About Tamazia

Tamazia is a lawyer-led SEO and compliance content firm working with regulated enterprises across the UK, EU, US, and Middle East. The founding team is based in London and Mumbai. Engagements are delivered by a small permanent team and a vetted network of freelance contributors.

Quick facts

  • Founder: Aman Pareek · LLM, King's College London
  • Senior Advisor: Manuel Penadés Fons · ICC/LCIA arbitration
  • Chief Legal Officer: Danish Khatri
  • Founded: 2026
  • Markets served: UK · UAE · USA · France · Singapore · Hong Kong
  • Sectors: Healthcare · Law firms · Real estate · Hospitality · Finance · Education · F&B

Boilerplate paragraphs

50 characters

Lawyer-led SEO for regulated enterprises.

150 characters

Tamazia is a lawyer-led SEO and compliance content firm. Every campaign passes through 200+ regulatory frameworks before anything goes live.

500 characters

Tamazia is a lawyer-led SEO and regulatory compliance firm working with regulated enterprises across the UK, EU, US, and Middle East. Every campaign passes through 200+ regulatory frameworks before anything goes live. Founded in 2026 by Aman Pareek (LLM, King's College London), Tamazia combines legal depth, institutional access through senior advisor Manuel Penadés Fons (ICC/LCIA arbitration), and commercial execution at scale across hospitality, healthcare, and real estate.

Brand assets

  • Master lockup · PNG
  • Horse mark · PNG
  • Logo · SVG (favicon)
  • Open Graph image · 1200 × 630
  • Brand guidelines · PDF (placeholder · contact for current version)

Brand colours

  • #5A1A2B · Oxblood · primary
  • #2A0C14 · Oxblood Ink · text
  • #C9A772 · Gold Soft · accent
  • #FAF7F2 · Ivory · background
  • #5C4047 · Ink Muted · secondary text

Type

  • Display: Playfair Display 500
  • Body: Inter 400 / 500 / 600
  • Editorial: Georgia (system serif fallback)

Press contact

Aman Pareek · founder@tamazia.co.uk · responses within one working day, UK time.

REGULATORY BRIEFINGS

Receive a quarterly briefing on regulatory developments affecting your sector. No marketing, no sales. Findings only.

By submitting you consent to receive regulatory briefings from Tamazia. Unsubscribe at any time. No marketing or sales content.
